entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Semiarid regions of India where the study was conducted

entities.name: PANEL DATA
entities.description: Data collected from 256 smallholder households from 2006 to 2014

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Households with small landholdings used as the primary unit of analysis

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The state of being exposed to the possibility of being harmed by climatic risk

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of smallholder households to adapt and respond to climatic risk

entities.name: CLIMATIC RISK
entities.description: Risks associated with climate variability, specifically drought

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall

entities.name: LANDHOLDINGS
entities.description: The size of land owned or managed by a household

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: The frequency with which a given piece of land is cropped

entities.name: CROP RISK
entities.description: The potential for crop failure or loss of income

entities.name: ON-FARM ENTERPRISES
entities.description: Business activities conducted on the farm to diversify income

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Farm animals kept as part of on-farm enterprises

entities.name: OFF-FARM INCOME SOURCES
entities.description: Income earned from activities outside of farming

entities.name: CASH CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown for sale to increase income and resilience

entities.name: RISKY CROPS
entities.description: Crops with high variability in yield or price used as a strategy for resilience

entities.name: BORROWING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a household to obtain loans to manage risk

entities.name: LIQUID INVESTMENTS
entities.description: Assets that can be quickly converted to cash to support resilience

entities.name: YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area
